title: Robust Snappy Italian Sausages Skillet
description: A kid-friendly Italian dish featuring Italian fennel sausages, double-fry method, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, with a sour and snappy flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the Italian fennel sausages and cook, breaking them up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the crushed tomato, apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
